planner.role: Lead sprint planning with capacity management and story selection

builder.role: Provide technical feasibility input and implementation guidance
builder.advisory_focus: - Technical complexity assessment - Implementation approach validation - Risk identification - Tool and library recommendations

prompt.task: Plan a 2-week sprint for a 5-agent team (Product Owner, Scrum Master, 2 Builders, 1 Reviewer) in a Rolling Kanban model by defining sprint goals, selecting stories, assigning tasks, and determining branch strategy.

context_loading.instructions: Before proceeding, read the context documentation inventory: - Read: .claude/docs/.context-docs-inventory.xml Based on the sprint's technical scope, read relevant context: - For TDD approach: Read testing/context/test-driven-development.md - For testing patterns: Read testing/context/unit-testing-patterns.md - For performance goals: Read architecture/performance-optimization.md - For debugging workflow: Read debugging/debugging-system-overview.md - For common patterns: Read debugging/common-patterns.md

available_tools.description: You have access to the following tools for executing this task. Tool mappings are defined in .claude/tools/tool-mappings.xml and full documentation is in .claude/tools/available-tools.xml

tool.name: Read
tool.description: Read user stories and velocity data

tool.name: Bash
tool.description: Execute gh CLI for GitHub operations

tool.name: github_mcp
tool.usage: Create sprint milestone, update story assignments, check branches

tool.name: code_reasoning_mcp
tool.usage: Optimize story selection and resource allocation

tool.name: postgres_mcp
tool.usage: Analyze database work across sprint stories

tool.name: newrelic_mcp
tool.usage: Establish performance baselines for sprint goals

available_tools.tool_usage_guidelines: - Use Read to examine user stories and team velocity - Use code_reasoning_mcp to optimize sprint capacity - Use github_mcp to create sprint milestone and update stories - Use postgres_mcp if sprint includes database changes - Use Write to create detailed sprint plan - Use Edit to update index.yml with assignments - Use newrelic_mcp to establish performance baselines

step.title: Define Sprint Goal
step.description: Write a concise goal aligned with PRD objectives.

step.title: Select Stories
step.description: Choose up to maximum stories from repository path based on priority and capacity, ensuring cross-cutting concerns are addressed.

step.title: Assign Tasks
step.description: Assign tasks to agents, specifying: - Libraries - Read-only and writeable files

step.title: Determine Branch Strategy
step.description: Assign branches, checking GitHub for conflicts.

step.title: Store Output
step.description: Format as markdown in repository path. Update index file with sprint entries (type: story, status: in_progress). Provide GitHub commit instructions.

step.title: GitHub Projects Sprint Setup
step.description: For selected stories: - Create Sprint Milestone issue using template: .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/sprint-milestone.md - Title: "Sprint {SPRINT_NUMBER}: {SPRINT_NAME}" - Fill in all template sections with sprint details - Link to parent Epic issue - List all selected stories with points and assignments - Update story issues with sprint assignment: - Set fields: - AAFD Stage: Sprint Planning - Sprint: Sprint {SPRINT_NUMBER} - Agent Assignment: {ASSIGNED_AGENT} - Implementation Phase: Analysis - Add sprint milestone reference to each story - Move stories to "Ready" column in Planning Board - Create GitHub milestone if needed: gh api repos/MLorneSmith/2025slideheroes/milestones --method POST -f title="Sprint {SPRINT_NUMBER}" -f due_on="{DUE_DATE}" - Add sprint plan as comment on Epic issue - Store sprint plan in: .claude/build/4-output/{epic-name}/5-sprints/sprint-{number}.md

step.title: Output Format
step.description: Structured markdown with sections for sprint goal, selected stories, task assignments, libraries, file paths, branch strategy, index updates, and commit instructions.

sprint_plan.sprint_goal: Implement the Prompts tRPC router to enable `/prompts` page functionality, replacing REST APIs.

assignment.task: Update frontend to call `createPrompt` (tRPC, React Query)

sprint_plan.index_updates: story_1: id: story_1 type: story status: in_progress linked_chunk: chunk_1 story_2: id: story_2 type: story status: in_progress linked_chunk: chunk_1
sprint_plan.commit_instructions: git checkout sprint-indexing git add .ai/doing/migrate-rest-to-trpc/sprint_1.md .ai/index.yml git commit -m "Sprint plan for tRPC migration sprint 1" git push origin sprint-indexing

synchronize.action: Finalize sprint plan with technical input

criteria.goal_clarity: Sprint goal is specific and achievable
criteria.story_readiness: All selected stories are ready for development

actions.on_pass: Sprint plan activated, stories move to Phase 6 (Implementation)
actions.on_fail: Sprint plan revised based on capacity or technical constraints

context_package.implementation_context: Technical approach and patterns to follow
context_package.definition_of_done: Clear completion criteria for each story
